title: URLhaus Recent Payloads
description: URLhaus Recent Payloads imports the most recently submitted malware payloads from URLhaus (abuse.ch) into OpenCTI. It fetches the latest malware samples distributed via malicious URLs, creating file observables (MD5, SHA-256) and malware entities, providing near-real-time visibility into active malware distribution activity.
short_description: Imports the most recent malware payloads from URLhaus (abuse.ch) into OpenCTI as file observables and malware entities.
